query:
-- bsip_beenleightmc → Beenleigh Medical Centre
-- bsip_jemaclout → Jemac
-- bsip_labtstnetcom → Lab Test Net / Labtest
-- bsip_staffcitydoc → Stafford City Doctors / Staff City Doc

SELECT id, name FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%Beenleigh%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Jemac%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Labtest%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Lab Test%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Stafford City%'
   OR name LIKE '%Staff City%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- bsip_beenleightmc → Beenleigh Medical Centre
-- bsip_jemaclout → Jemac
-- bsip_labtstnetcom → Lab Test Net / Labtest
-- bsip_staffcitydoc → Stafford City Doctors / Staff City Doc

SELECT id, name FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%Beenleigh%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Jemac%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Labtest%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Lab Test%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Stafford City%'
   OR name LIKE '%Staff City%';
